About Us

Who We Are

Go 4 Diagnostic is a modern pathology lab in Delhi committed to providing accurate, affordable, and timely diagnostic services to every patient.


We offer a comprehensive range of diagnostic services — from routine blood tests to advanced immunology and molecular diagnostics — all under one roof. Our experienced team ensures every test is conducted with precision and care.


📞 Contact Us Today
🏠

Home Sample Collection

We send trained phlebotomists to collect blood samples right at your doorstep — safe, hygienic & convenient.

🔬

Advanced Testing

State-of-the-art equipment for 631+ tests including biochemistry, hematology, microbiology & more.

📋

Digital Reports

Get your test reports delivered digitally via WhatsApp or email within the promised turnaround time.

💰

Affordable Pricing

Transparent, affordable pricing with no hidden charges. Quality diagnostics accessible to all.

What We Offer

Our Pathology Services

Comprehensive pathology services across all major disciplines, handled by qualified professionals.

🩸

Hematology

Complete blood counts, coagulation studies, peripheral blood smear, ESR, bone marrow analysis, and more to diagnose blood disorders and infections.

📞 Enquire Now
🦠

Microbiology

Culture & sensitivity tests, AFB smear, Gram staining, rapid antigen tests, and serological tests for detecting bacterial, viral, and fungal infections.

📞 Enquire Now
🧪

Biochemistry

Liver function, kidney function, thyroid profile, lipid profile, blood glucose, electrolytes, enzymes, and comprehensive metabolic panels.

📞 Enquire Now
🛡️

Immunology

Autoimmune panels, allergy testing, TORCH profiles, HIV, hepatitis markers, immunoglobulins, and advanced immunological assays.

📞 Enquire Now
🔍

Histopathology / Cytology

Biopsy analysis, FNAC, PAP smear, cytology of body fluids, tissue diagnosis for cancer screening and pathological staging.

📞 Enquire Now
⚗️

Anatomic Blood Tests

Urine analysis, stool examination, body fluid analysis, tumor markers, hormone panels, and specialized anatomic pathology investigations.

📞 Enquire Now
